description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian figure with a slim build, standing upright with arms relaxed at her sides. She is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve crop top featuring a checkered pattern and high-waisted, form-fitting pants. Her footwear consists of open-toe sandals with ankle straps and decorative elements at the back. The figure has a short, straight bob hairstyle with a side part, and her facial features are smooth and animated. The overall appearance is modern and casual, suitable for an urban environment. The materials and surface finish suggest a synthetic, slightly matte texture typical of digital character models.
description: A modern adult female figure in a checkered crop top, fitted pants, and sandals, with a short bob hairstyle and a casual urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the checkered crop top, fitted pants, open-toe sandals, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the crop top's fit, and the decorative sandal details at the heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back cutout of the crop top, the fit of the pants, and the sandal straps and decorations.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm position, and sandal details.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve crop top and fitted pants with open-toe sandals
